name: platformer-2d
notes: Agent few-shot sample (R-QA-006): a small but REAL 2D platformer Context project (M6 EXIT).
The startup scene composes a shared room sub-scene (L-35), adds a camera, and lays out the
game: an input-driven run+jump Player (scripts/movement.ts authors the per-tick control in
TypeScript), 2D physics platforms + a pushable crate, a landing particle puff, jump/coin
sounds (null audio backend), and sprite-sheet animation via the anim-graph. Headless-runnable
and integer/fixed-point-deterministic: the runtime mirror is registered as session scenario
game-smoke-platformer-2d ctest. Every authored file is canonical JSON (L-32): UTF-8, LF, no
comments -- human/AI annotations live in schema-blessed `notes` fields like this one.
